goal: Generate a step card image for the 'Browse and select your vehicle' how-it-works step — family hands holding a smartphone showing car options, in a warm hotel or lounge context in Orlando.

creative_direction.core_idea: El momento de decisión — una familia hojeando opciones de autos en el teléfono en la comodidad de su hotel
creative_direction.visual_thesis: Simple, humano, cálido. La experiencia de browsing es fácil y funciona desde cualquier dispositivo

composition.shot_type: editorial hands + phone detail, warm interior context
composition.layout: hands and phone sharp in foreground, warm hotel interior softly blurred in background

camera.angle: slight overhead or natural eye level looking at hands holding phone
camera.lens_style: 50mm portrait with shallow depth of field
camera.depth_of_field: hands and phone sharp, background warmly blurred

subject.description: LATAM adult hands — possibly a couple — holding a modern smartphone with abstract vehicle selection interface visible on screen. Generic car card layouts or silhouettes, not branded as any specific app.
subject.body_language: natural hand position holding phone, relaxed hotel context

scene.location: Hotel room, resort lobby, or comfortable lounge in Orlando hotel area — Lake Buena Vista or I-Drive
scene.time_of_day: warm afternoon or evening interior light
environment: warm amber and cream interior hotel tones
resort hotel furniture visible and softly blurred
one or two additional family members warmly blurred in background
scene.background_view: Warm hotel interior — resort lounge or room at Lake Buena Vista Orlando area
critical_scene_rules: Phone screen must not show any recognizable competitor app or brand

lighting.effects: amber and cream tones, soft fill, no harsh shadows

dominant: warm amber and cream hotel interior
rules: Warm and comfortable — amber and cream palette

negative_prompt: no competitor app logos on screen
master_prompt: Create a premium editorial step card image for a how-it-works page illustrating the 'Browse and select your vehicle' step. Show LATAM adult hands — possibly a couple — holding a modern smartphone in a warm hotel or resort lounge in Orlando, Florida, in the Lake Buena Vista or International Drive area. The phone screen shows an abstract vehicle selection interface — generic car card layouts or silhouettes, not branded as any specific app or competitor. One or two family members may be warmly and softly blurred in the background. Use 4:3 card format with hands and phone sharp in focus, warm hotel interior background softly blurred. Lighting is warm ambient hotel interior light — amber and cream tones, no harsh flash or cold studio light. The mood is relaxed, comfortable, and confident — a family making an easy decision from their hotel room. Avoid text, watermarks, competitor app logos, cold lighting, office context, outdoor settings, and generic stock photo hand poses.
